description: Exceptional family estate in the sought-after Riverstone community! This spacious home offers 5 bedrooms plus a study, formal dining, and a massive game room upstairs. Gourmet kitchen features double ovens, gas cooktop, and walk-in pantry. Primary retreat downstairs with sitting area and luxurious bath. Resort-style backyard with saltwater pool, spa, and summer kitchen. Excellent Fort Bend ISD schools and resort-style community amenities including pools, tennis courts, and walking trails. Easy access to Highway 59 and a short commute to the Medical Center and Galleria.
